text: Have you heard? We've moved to a new house.
Really, where are you living now?
We moved to...
Canada. I don't know if you've been there. Winter's up.
freezing there. Summer's a pretty warm though.
What made you decide to move there?
It's near my...
grandmother's place. She's old now and she needs her for a long time.
family around her.
How do you find it?
It's
Great! Every winter there is an amazing winter!
festival. It's called the Iceman Winter Pass.
What happens is the locals build a new building.
a huge ice sculpture near the lake.
all kinds of activities and food to eat there.
as well as fairground rides and games.
You can
And even watch your favorite TV show on the side of the screen.
sculpture. It's hugely popular with young people.
and there is always a big crowd there.
Well...
Wow, you'll have to take me there sometime.
you should come along during our next school holiday.
Thank you, I'd love to go.
